brief_question_sets.label: Tutorial intro
questions: What outcome should the viewer get?
How long should the video be?
Should the upload stop at draft, or continue to an unlisted YouTube upload?
brief_question_sets.notes: Use when the request is a how-to or walkthrough.

brief_question_sets.label: Marketing launch
questions: What is the core promise or headline?
What proof points should the video include?
What call to action should end the video?
Should the final step be an unlisted upload, or only a prepared publish package?
brief_question_sets.notes: Use when the video is meant to promote Kyberion.

theme_sets.label: Marketing launch
theme_sets.notes: Best for product announcements and promotional clips.
